judgment.summary: Strong recent growth and profitability are tempered by a high valuation and significant debt load.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 1.2%; next earnings date 2026-07-28.
positives: Quarterly earnings growth 136.3% YoY — exceptional recent performance.
Revenue growth 20.0% YoY — solid top-line expansion.
Analyst consensus is 'buy' with a mean target of $197.67.
negatives: Trailing P/E 89.66x and Forward P/E 44.15x — valuation is elevated.
Debt/Equity 80.36% and Total debt $9.92B vs $1.76B cash — significant leverage.
Quick ratio 0.75 — liquidity could be a concern in the short term.
Jim Cramer's bearish commentary suggests potential for negative sentiment.

news.paragraph: Corning (GLW) is seeing mixed signals from analysts, with Mizuho raising its price target while Jim Cramer expressed skepticism about buying the stock after its recent decline. This divergence suggests traders should carefully consider the market's current sentiment and any potential catalysts ahead of the next earnings report.

headlines.title: Jim Cramer on Corning: “The Beatdown’s Not Enough to Entice Me to Buy”
Mizuho Raises its Price Target on Corning (GLW)

examples.body: $GFS $GLW Added these 2 yesterday after listening to Nvidia ER and bought more $NOK this morning. What a luck.
$GLW I just heard Google gonna try the glasses again? Hmmmm, wonder who will make the glass?
$GLW need $200 by tomorrow or have chance next week with $212 calls
